meta.note: Node table (ADR-002/006). Ported from models/marts/core/_core.yml dbt tests (dbt dropped, ADR-008). The client_id->dim_client and (downstream) asset_id FKs were dbt `relationships` tests; in this stack they run as a Warehouse reconciliation query (see meta.referential), since a single-table GE suite cannot express a cross-table FK.
referential: every dim_asset.client_id must exist in dim_client.client_id (was dbt relationships -> dim_client)
